items.why_it_matters: 具体场景会把烟酒店对话从泛咨询推进到真实购买筹备。
items.echoer_action: Use the scene signal to guide toward budget, timing, and store details.

trigger_patterns: not over two hundred per bottle
items.why_it_matters: 预算带可以快速帮助 Echoer 收窄推荐路线和到店承接。
items.echoer_action: Anchor the reply in the budget band and gather any scene details still missing.

items.why_it_matters: 时间窗口会显著影响库存、配送和承接方式。
items.echoer_action: Use the timing to move toward visit or fulfillment details.

trigger_patterns: why is the scan price different?
items.why_it_matters: 真假与授权担忧说明用户并非随便看看，而是把信任当作成交前提。
items.echoer_action: Use evidence-first language and avoid hard-sell replies.

items.why_it_matters: 数量与体量有助于 Echoer 区分散单与整单场景。
items.echoer_action: Shift larger-volume cases toward qualified routing quickly.

trigger_patterns: must deliver tonight no matter what
items.why_it_matters: 绝对化期待如果不及时降温，容易形成履约或售后风险。
items.echoer_action: Stabilize the tone, restate evidence and real boundary conditions.
